# Producer.ai Archiver

> A Node.js backup tool that uses Playwright browser automation to download your entire Producer.ai music library — M4A audio, cover art, lyrics, prompts, and all metadata. Resumes on crash, skips already-downloaded songs, and handles Cloudflare-protected sessions.

- This tool requires Node.js 18+ and runs a real Chromium browser to bypass Cloudflare bot detection
- Authentication is handled via Supabase chunked cookies (`sb-api-auth-token.0`, `.1`, etc.) which encode a JWT Bearer token
- The user must log in manually on first run (`--headful` flag), then signal readiness by running `touch producer_login_ready`
- All API calls run inside `page.evaluate(fetch(...))` in the browser context with `credentials: 'include'`
- Downloads are concurrent (default 8 workers) with retry and exponential backoff
- Output goes to `producer_backup/` with hex-prefixed subfolders (e.g. `0a/`, `3f/`, `ff/`)
- The manifest is streamed to JSON item-by-item to handle 8000+ song libraries without hitting V8 string limits

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Installation, usage instructions, and what gets downloaded
- [Technical Reference](TECHNICAL_REFERENCE.md): Architecture, authentication flow, API endpoints, known issues, and output format

## Source

- [archiver.mjs](archiver.mjs): The main archival script — single-file, ~700 lines of JavaScript
- [package.json](package.json): Dependencies (playwright, p-queue, p-retry)
